{{Infobox location
| name = Shiryu Mountain
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Shiryu Mountain, also known as Mount Shiryu, is a massive formation of black stone that rises from a desert landscape. The mountain is characterized by its dark, wave-like appearance and features the remains of ancient [[dragons]], including a massive serpentine skull at its base and skeletal structures that span the city of [[Serpent's Grave]]. The mountain consists of multiple peaks; the highest summit serves as the primary residence for the [[Jai clan]], housing their palaces and the living quarters for their leadership. A secondary peak also exists within the range. The terrain includes deep clefts and miniature valleys surrounded by spire-like rock formations. While the mountain is a prominent landmark looming over the nearby city, it has also been subject to intense bursts of black-spotted fire that briefly resembled volcanic activity.}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Located within [[Serpent's Grave]], Shiryu Mountain is the site where the final [[dragons]] perished. The mountain features a secondary peak and a main peak situated beneath the palaces of the [[Jai]] family. Having built their homes upon the mountain, most members of the [[Jai clan]] have retreated to its summit. Additionally, a peak on Mount Shiryu serves as the location where flames once blasted into the sky.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Shiryu Mountain]] is the peak where the last of the [[dragons]] died.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c7">''Blackflame'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Shiryu Mountain]] is located in [[Serpent's Grave]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c11">''Blackflame'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Shiryu Mountain]] has a secondary peak.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c12">''Blackflame'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Most of the [[Jai clan]] has retreated to the peak of [[Shiryu Mountain]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c16">''Blackflame'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Jai clan]] built their homes on [[Shiryu Mountain]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Shiryu Mountain]] has a main peak beneath the [[Jai]] family palaces.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19">''Blackflame'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Mount Shiryu has a peak where flames blasted into the sky.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c22">''Blackflame'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
